programme.desc: Zac Djellab, Ollie Thomas and Alex Moneypenny join Smithy and Joe this week. Plus, Morgan Rogers answers some Quick Fire Qs, while Matz Sels and Nikola Milenkovic try to Beat the Clock.

programme.title: PL One on One: Jordan Pickford
programme.desc: Hear from Everton and England number one goalkeeper Jordan Pickford on the One on One podcast.

programme.title: PL One on One: Mikel Arteta
programme.desc: Contrasting his experiences with those currently at Arsenal, Mikel Arteta reflects on his time as a 16-year-old at Barcelona, revealing how senior players took him under their wing.

programme.title: Premier League Preview
programme.desc: A look ahead to the weekend of matches in the Premier League, with analysis of all the key talking points and the major news.

programme.desc: Follow the pre-match build up with the Soccer Saturday panel to an afternoon of football up and down the country, with breaking news, analysis and discussion.

programme.title: Gillette Soccer Sat: Live Scores
programme.desc: Stay up to speed with the afternoon's football up and down the country as goals go in and updates arrive in the studio from around the grounds.

programme.title: Live SNF: West Ham v Bournemouth
programme.desc: On Saturday Night Football, West Ham welcome Bournemouth to the London Stadium. Still in the bottom three, a win here for the Irons would draw them level with Forest.

programme.title: PL Stories: Shinji Okazaki
programme.desc: This is the journey of Shinji Okazaki; from his beginnings in Japanese football to becoming a Premier League champion with Leicester and now shaping the next generation at Basara Mainz.

programme.title: The Big Interview: Xavi Simons
programme.desc: Tottenham's Xavi Simons discusses growing up under the weight of expectations, his journey to the Premier League and settling into life in north London.

programme.title: Transfer 360: Michael Carrick
programme.desc: Tasked with replacing the legendary Roy Keane at Manchester United: how did Michael Carrick handle his move from Tottenham Hotspur? Hear from him as well as former managers and teammates.

programme.title: Transfer 360: John Hartson
